title: US lifts naval blockade as Iran's supreme leader says Trump made deal 'out of desperation'
snippet: Iran's supreme leader says he disagrees with the deal and Donald Trump signed it "out of desperation".

title: Bowen: US-Iran deal raises inescapable question of what the war was for
snippet: While the human cost is clear, the Iranian regime has not just survived the war, it has been empowered.

title: What Iran and US get from deal and why both could struggle to keep it
snippet: BBC analysts assess the claims by both Washington and Tehran to have won a victory with the deal to end their war.

title: Moscow residents complain of black rain after largest Ukrainian attack hits oil refinery
snippet: A refinery and a shopping centre burned after almost 200 Ukrainian drones struck an area to the south-east of the Russian capital.

title: Thirty-five killed as gunmen attack Niger's biggest airport
snippet: Niger has been fighting a militant Islamist insurgency for a decade and in January suspected jihadists attacked the same airport.

title: Parents of Serbia's teenage school shooter given jail terms in retrial
snippet: The boy was 13 when he killed eight girls, a boy and a school guard at Vladislav Ribnikar school in Belgrade in 2023.

title: Hegseth renews Nato criticism and says US will review presence in Europe
snippet: The US defence secretary's move follows a US decision to scale back its commitments to a high readiness force within the alliance.

title: British man dies in paragliding accident in Spain
snippet: Authorities in Catalonia confirmed that the 63-year-old died in the Palau de Noguera area on Wednesday.

title: Suspected gang leader shot dead in flower bouquet ambush at airport
snippet: The gunmen concealed their weapons behind flowers and stuffed toys while waiting for the victim outside Guayaquil airport.

title: Jury fails to reach verdict in Norwegian 'hitman' trial
snippet: Johannes Natland, 19, was remanded in custody and will now face a retrial.

title: GTA 6 pre-order date and cover art revealed by Rockstar
snippet: The developer has said pre-sales of the hugely anticipated game will begin on 25 June.

title: AI will create more jobs for humans, not replace them, Amazon founder Bezos says
snippet: The Amazon founder, who now has robotics and space travel companies, thinks AI will create a labour shortage.

title: What to study in the AI age - from big tech bosses
snippet: Sundar Pichai, Jensen Huang and Jack Clark share their advice with the BBC.

title: Snap unveils £1,995 smart glasses after previous flops
snippet: The augmented reality glasses from Snapchat's parent company are expected to ship in autumn.

title: Five big questions about the UK's under-16s social media ban
snippet: A ban is coming - but it's still not clear what it will mean for sites including Roblox, YouTube and WhatsApp.
